name: Sven | Grand Duke Matari
description:
Noble!char x Nanny!user

Normally I don't have specific roles for characters but I can't find reallu any other way to introduce characters if you have any please do share!!

Notes for those following my series

If you've come from my other bots do be warned that this has taken place years before either of them were born (So Yscalon is still a kingdom). Also if another character (not this one) mentions Grand duke Marari immediately assume it's NOT Sven but his grandson Astrian whom is nicknamed the white lion. (Astrian is not born yet with this bot but his mom Naja is)

As always I used the pronoun macros so don't forget to set your personas pronouns!!

Unestablished relationship

Settings (Map of world is currently a wip)

Continent of Ovrisk (North)

★ You are here ★

Based off of nordic and vikings along with hints of old Russian (hence the Tsardom)

Home to Eshar Yscalon

Continent of Aphsodian (South)

Think basically Arabia warm deserts, belly dancers etc

Home to: Spyria, Chitte, and Aspirik

Continent of Darlk (West)

Basically where elves live not much is known on the continent. (Mostly to allow you to add custom world building for you chats)

Eastern Continent (East)

American/British based home to Arax, smaller kingdoms are hinted at in the character definition so you can add your own kingdom should you desire.

Palace of Eshar

Matari manor

Outside courtyard

Dining room

Gardens
